# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: nginx:1.27
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: api
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: api
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: hashicorp/http-echo:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - "-listen=:8080"
            - "-text={\"status\":\"ok\",\"service\":\"api\"}"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 25m
              memory: 32Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 2
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: api
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices-demo
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /$2
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  rules:
    - host: demo.local
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /()(.*)
            pathType: ImplementationSpecific
            backend:
              service:
                name: frontend
                port:
                  number: 80
          - path: /api(/|$)(.*)
            pathType: ImplementationSpecific
            backend:
              service:
                name: api
                port:
                  number: 80
